method: Bounding polygon around the named coastal section from Port de Soller through Cala Tuent to Sa Calobra, with documented inland and seaward margins
rationale: A meaningful contiguous Serra de Tramuntana section containing Port de Soller, multiple exposed headlands, Cala Tuent and Sa Calobra; it includes steep and locally gentler terrain while requiring only the two MDT02 tiles that intersect the buffered processing corridor.
source_geometry: IHM Linea de costa 2022 COSTA layer, CIERRACOST=true and PLEAMAR=true
exclusions: Coastline outside the bounds, including the remainder of Mallorca and all other Balearic islands
